templates.name: Do your bags come with stroller straps?
templates.content: All Baby Bags come with two stroller straps and one shoulder strap.

templates.name: Do you offer free returns?
templates.content: Returns are free if you return for store credit or exchange. Please note that there is a restocking fee if you're returning for a refund to the original payment method.

templates.name: Can I preview the specific condition of a pre loved bag?
templates.content: All of our pre-loved styles have their own unique quirks. As such, we unfortunately cannot offer what specific details or conditions are per style prior to purchase. Please note that all sample sales are final.

templates.name: Will there be newer colors (for ANY product)?
templates.content: We don't have immediate plans, but you never know what the future may bring. I recommend subscribing to our newsletter to stay up to date on everything!

templates.name: Where do you ship from?
templates.content: Our warehouse is in Salt Lake City, Utah.

templates.name: Can both the Nylon and Cotton baby bag withstand the same weight?
templates.content: Both our Nylon and Cotton styles are designed to withstand all weight of your daily routine.

templates.name: Difference between Sling: Small and Medium
templates.content: The Sling is a lightweight everyday crossbody wrapped in cloud-like nylon. Our small Sling has the following dimensions: 4.5 h x 10.5 w x 3.6 d inch. It's compact while fitting more than you think and it's a perfect companion to a day adventuring on foot. Our medium sized Sling has these dimensions: 7.25 h x 20.75 w x 7.25 d inch and it's great for longer hauls. Both have 3 carrying modes: back, chest, waistbag and an adjustable waist belt.

templates.name: Difference between Baby Bag: Mini, Medium and Large
templates.content: The Baby Bag Mini is a sized-down version of our flagship style for your little one. Its dimensions are: 5.5 h x 6.5 w x 5 d inch. Our medium Baby Bag is a swiss army knife for your parenting needs. It features dedicated spots for diapers, wipes, bottles, clothing, toys, and more and its dimesnions are: 12.25 h x 12 w x 5 d inch. Our large Baby Bag has the following dimensions: 13.75 h x 12.75 w x 5.75 d inch. It fits a 13" laptop as well, and it's the perfect everyday bag for every day and travel.

templates.name: Difference between the Studio: Small, Medium and Large
templates.content: The Studio Bag is a bespoke convertible that can transition from satchel to backpack to crossbody. Our small Studio bag is compact while fitting more than you think, including an 11" laptop. Its dimensions are 12 h x 9 w x 9 d inch, and it's the perfect companion to a day adventuring on foot. Our medium is the most popular and has the following dimensions: 13.75 h x 9.75 w x 9 d inch. It fits a 13" laptop, and it's the perfect everyday bag to shuffle between the office, studio, and street. Our large Studio bag fits a 15" laptop, and it's dimensions are 15.5 h x 10.5 w x 9 d inch. It's great for overnights, weekenders, longer hauls, and that one extra outfit change.

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $35. Maybe you can add something else to reach the min?

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that, but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://caraa.co/collections/sale

templates.name: How do I clean my masks?
templates.content: For a longer lifespan, I recommend hand-washing with cold water and air drying. It's also safe to machine wash cold, without bleach. Don't tumble dry and don't place it in the oven or microwave as there is plastic and metal content in the mask. You can safely iron it.

templates.name: How do I take care of my leather bag?
templates.content: The leather can be cleaned and restored with standard fabric cleaner, leather cleaner, and moisturizer sets.

templates.name: How do I clean my mask pouches?
templates.content: They can be machine washed in cold water and laid flat to air dry or spot cleaned with mild neutral soap mixed with warm water.

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://caraa.co/stockists

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: We offer returns and exchanges on new and unused items within 21 days of shipment, excluding final sale items (masks, croco, vaqueta, sale). You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://caraa.co/returns

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. You can join by creating an account here: https://caraa.co/account/register For other referral questions, you can email us directly at hello@caraa.co (that's 'co', not 'com').

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 2 business days and once shipped, it will take 5 business days for domestic orders.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at +1-202-603-9958 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: For a quick turnaround to your question, please reach out to our support team directly at hello@caraa.co. One of my colleagues will be more than happy to help out!

templates.name: Difference between Nimbus: Medium and Large
templates.content: The Nimbus is a lightweight convertible weekender wrapped in water-resistant ultralight cloud-like nylon. Our medium Nimbus has the following dimensions: 12.5 h x 15.75 w x 7 d inch. It fits a 13" laptop, and it's the perfect everyday bag to shuffle between the office, studio, and street. Our large Nimbus has these dimensions: 13 h x 18.5 w x 8.5 d inch. It fits a 15" laptop, and it's perfect for overnights, weekenders, longer hauls, and that one extra outfit change.

templates.name: Difference between Cumulus: Small and Medium
templates.content: The Cumulus is a lightweight everyday tote that's designed to fit all of your essentials. Our small Cumulus has the following dimensions: 12 h x 11 w x 8.5 d inch. It's compact while fitting more than you think, and comes with a removable crossbody strap. Our medium Cumulus has these dimensions: 12.5 h x 22 w x 11 d inch. It fits a 15" laptop, and it's the perfect everyday bag to shuffle between the office, studio, and street.

templates.name: Difference between Studio 2 Mini, Medium and Large
templates.content: The Studio 2, is a streamlined take on our flagship Studio Bag, and a bespoke convertible that can transition from backpack to crossbody. The Studio 2 mini has the following dimensions: 9 h x 6 w x 5 d inch. It fits a tablet, and it's great for breezy days or a night out. Our medium is the most popular and has the following dimensions: 13.75 h x 9.75 w x 9 d inch. It fits a 13" laptop, and it's the perfect everyday bag to shuffle between the office, studio, and street. Our Studio 2 large is the extra roomy one: 15.75 h x 10.5 w x 9 d inch. It fits a 15" laptop, and is designed for overnights, weekenders, longer hauls, and that one extra outfit change.

templates.name: Difference between Studio Tote: Medium and Large
templates.content: The Studio Tote is a bespoke Italian leather tote-to-backpack convertible with rollaway shoe compartment. Our medium Studio Tote is the most popular and has the following dimensions: 12 h x 17.75 w x 7.5 d inch. It fits a 15" laptop, and it's the perfect everyday bag to shuffle between the office, studio, and street. Our large Studio Tote has these dimensions: 13 h x 18 w x 7.5 d inch. It fits a 17" laptop, and it's perfect for overnights, weekenders, longer hauls, and that one extra outfit change.

templates.name: Difference between Cirrus: Small and Medium
templates.content: The Cirrus is a lightweight rucksack backpack wrapped in water-resistant ultralight cloud-like nylon. Our small Cirrus has the following dimensions: 13 h x 12.6 w x 6.3 d inch. It fits an 11" laptop, and it's the perfect everyday bag for breezy days or errands. Our medium Cirrus has these dimensions: 14 h x 15 w x 8 d inch. It fits a 13" laptop, and it's the perfect everyday bag to shuffle between the office, studio, and street.
